mapper.sql: d.id, d.client_id, d.app_id, d.device_identification, d.device_name, p.user_name, p.password, p.auth_mode, p.public_key, p.private_key, d.product_identification, d.device_status, d.connect_status, p.protocol_type, d.ip_address, d.extension, d.tenant_id, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time
mapper.select:
select
from device d left join product p on p.product_identification = d.product_identification and p.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where d.product_identification = #{productIdentification,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and d.device_identification = #{deviceIdentification,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and d.deleted = 0 limit 1

select
from device d inner join product p on p.product_identification = d.product_identification and p.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where upper(p.protocol_type) = upper(#{protocolType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and coalesce(d.device_status, 'ENABLE') != 'DISABLE' and d.deleted = 0 and coalesce(p.status, '0') = '0' and d.extension is not null and d.extension != ''

select
from device d left join product p on p.product_identification = d.product_identification and p.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where d.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and d.deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update device set connect_status = #{connectStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_online_time = #{lastOnlineTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, active_status = 1, activated_time = COALESCE(activated_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0
update device set extension = (#{extension,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb)::text, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0
update device set device_version = #{deviceVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

update device set extension = ( COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) || #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb )::text, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

update device set extension = ( COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object( 'shadow', #{shadow,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, 'shadowUpdateTime', to_jsonb(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) )::text, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

update device set extension = ( case when COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb->'logs', '[]'::jsonb) @> jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object( 'id', (#{logEntry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb)->'id')) then COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) else jsonb_set( COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), '{logs}', COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb->'logs', '[]'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_array(#{logEntry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb), true ) end )::text, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

update device set extension = ( COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('config', #{config,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb) )::text, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

update device set extension = ( COALESCE(NULLIF(extension, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('ota', #{otaProgress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb) )::text, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0
